title: Kedarnath Temple Reopens Today; Char Dham Yatra 2026 Begins With New Rules, Mandatory Registration
description: The Kedarnath Temple opened for devotees on Wednesday, starting the Kedarnath segment of the Char Dham Yatra 2026, following traditional rituals amid tight security. The pilgrimage began on April 19 with the Gangotri and Yamunotri temples. Badrinath Temple is set to open on April 23.
